name: 非营业个人客车 — 单交强
filter: p.customer_category = '非营业个人客车' AND p.coverage_combination = '单交'

name: 非营业个人客车 — 交三 — 燃油车
filter: p.customer_category = '非营业个人客车' AND p.coverage_combination = '交三' AND p.is_nev = false

name: 非营业个人客车 — 交三 — 新能源
filter: p.customer_category = '非营业个人客车' AND p.coverage_combination = '交三' AND p.is_nev = true

name: 非营业个人客车 — 主全 — 燃油车
filter: p.customer_category = '非营业个人客车' AND p.coverage_combination = '主全' AND p.is_nev = false

name: 非营业个人客车 — 主全 — 新能源
filter: p.customer_category = '非营业个人客车' AND p.coverage_combination = '主全' AND p.is_nev = true

name: 营业出租租赁 — 燃油车
filter: p.customer_category = '营业出租租赁' AND p.is_nev = false

name: 营业出租租赁 — 新能源
filter: p.customer_category = '营业出租租赁' AND p.is_nev = true

name: 营业货车 — 牵引车
filter: p.customer_category = '营业货车' AND p.truck_type = '牵引'

name: 非营业货车 — 1-2吨
filter: p.customer_category = '非营业货车' AND p.tonnage_segment = '1-2吨'

name: 货车 — 1吨以下（营业+非营业）
filter: (p.customer_category IN ('营业货车','非营业货车')) AND p.tonnage_segment = '1吨以下'

name: 营业货车 — 9吨以上 — 自卸车
filter: p.customer_category = '营业货车' AND p.tonnage_segment IN ('9-10吨','10吨以上') AND p.truck_type LIKE '%自卸%'

name: 营业货车 — 9吨以上 — 除牵引自卸外
filter: p.customer_category = '营业货车' AND p.tonnage_segment IN ('9-10吨','10吨以上') AND (p.truck_type IS NULL OR (p.truck_type NOT LIKE '%牵引%' AND p.truck_type NOT LIKE '%自卸%'))

name: 营业货车 — 1-2吨 — 燃油车
filter: p.customer_category = '营业货车' AND p.tonnage_segment = '1-2吨' AND p.is_nev = false

name: 营业货车 — 1-2吨 — 新能源
filter: p.customer_category = '营业货车' AND p.tonnage_segment = '1-2吨' AND p.is_nev = true
